offer: For property managers processing 10–20 properties/month, time-consuming manual report generation causes delayed financial insights. We automate quarterly financial report generation instead of manual spreadsheet reporting.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar tools
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Participate in property management forums and groups
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation for a few items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
